ops.text: E23 RESUME-FROM-DISK (new lane; prior lane died at session limit). State found on disk: out/rules.json = 14 compiled candidate rules (R01-R14); data/fired/ = 14 fired-site sample files (8 sites each, held-out-first); data/judged/ = 13 judged files (R01-R13) + _summary.json covering only R01-R13. GAP: R14-loose-scratch-md fired but never judged. Plan: (1) judge R14 with the SAME judge protocol (scripts/judge.py: opus/spawnllm large, identical RUBRIC + build_prompt, 8 held-out sites); (2) rebuild _summary.json deterministically from all 14 judged files (judge.py would otherwise clobber the R01-R13 summary since it rewrites _summary.json from argv rule_ids only); (3) run scripts/finalize.py to produce out/precision_table.md + bootstrap CIs; (4) evaluate the pre-registered criterion EXACTLY as registered (>=10 rules at >=80% judged precision), no bar-lowering, no cherry-picking. Prior _summary.json (R01-R13): precision R01=0.0 R02=0.0 R03=0.0 R04=0.125 R05=0.0 R06=0.125 R07=0.125 R08=0.125 R09=0.125 R10=1.0 R11=0.25 R12=0.875 R13=0.875 -> only 3 rules pass 80% before R14. Cap $3 (spend only on the genuine R14 gap).
